rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"Add a comment whenever a role is intentionally excluded from an access check — it makes the design rationale explicit and saves future readers from questioning the exclusion.","scope":"auth/Payload access control"},{"kind":"convention","text":"AdvancedContentEditor is the exercise-editor role (manages exercises) and is distinct from course-manager roles — they should not have course-level read access by design.","scope":"LMS role model"}]}
